response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data pipelines, and open-source tooling — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct RAG/vector DB implementation, or enterprise GenAI consulting, and his AI experience is embedded within broader full-stack work rather than as a primary focus.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and data pipeline exposure via AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and real-time systems
Strong technical leadership and mentoring track record through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years dedicated to production AI systems; most AI work is recent or secondary
Missing explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in resume
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise GenAI consulting contexts

key_factors.factor: Lack of Explicit GenAI Production Track Record
